title: Evangelion Final Rumored to be Released This Winter
display_title: Evangelion Final Rumored to be Released This Winter
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Final Rumored to be Released This Winter Post by shinhito » Tue Jul 14, 2015 1:35 pm I just found this interesting bit of news/gossip. I figured I would post it here for people to ruminate upon. Basically this is just another reiteration on the same rumor about Hikaru Utada's song release for Final that was going around this past winter too. So, it'll probably amount to nothing but it would be a miracle of epic proportions for Shin Eva to be released this year... Final Evangelion Movie Rumored to be Coming This Winter . Peace and Love and Evangelion.

[]: Post by pwhodges » Tue Jul 14, 2015 1:38 pm We already have a thread including this rumour .
